prompt: Create a polished anime-style vertical portrait of a mysterious elegant woman standing indoors in front of a large circular moon-gate window with black geometric lattice framing. She has very long wind-swept black hair fading into vivid purple at the ends streaming dramatically to the left, while her face is intentionally covered by a soft square blur centered over the head. Her pose is graceful and theatrical: one arm raised above her head with delicate fingers, the other arm lowered to the side, body angled slightly upward as if caught in a breeze. Dress her in exactly 6 visible outfit/accessory elements: a crisp white button-up blouse, a flowing black outer robe, ornate gold embroidered trim on the robe edges and cuffs, a dark pleated skirt, a wide burgundy leather belt with metal buckle, and a dangling gold-and-tassel waist ornament. The background shows a bright white circular window with exactly 1 large dark tree branch crossing the upper left area, dotted with small purple blossoms, plus exactly 1 warm paper lantern hanging in the upper left with a red tassel. Add exactly 1 cluster of purple flowers and green leaves in the lower right foreground, with a few warm glowing bokeh lights near the lower left. Use a refined Japanese fantasy illustration aesthetic, high-detail fabric folds, elegant linework, soft cinematic lighting, deep navy shadows, violet accents, gold ornament highlights, and a serene spring atmosphere. Canvas should be vertical 3:4, waist-up to full-body crop, no text, no watermark, no extra characters.
